---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Solo Level
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

**Is your request related to a problem?**
A clear, concise description of the problem. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when …"

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you considered, and why you'd prefer the one above.

**Use case**
Who benefits and how. The more concrete, the better.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, related issues/discussions.
